name: Mother Machine
short_description: Team up for 1-4 player co-op platforming in procedurally-generated alien caves! Customize your gremlin, embrace the chaos and fart on friends! Tackle challenges together and unlock new looks and wild mutations for your next run!
detailed_description:
Steamdeck Verified


New FREE DLC : The Creators' Ruins!

Get ready for a massive, free lifetime update

Being the chaotic gremlins we are, we're thrilled to unveil this lifetime-free Biome DLC for your enjoyment! Gather your friends and prepare for mayhem: the Creators' Ruins are waiting to be explored (and most likely wrecked) by you!

The Creators' Ruins seamlessly extends the base game of Mother Machine with an array of exciting new features:

10 New Mutations

Unlock even more special Mutations to expand your gameplay abilities! Steal health with the Vampire Attack, or morph into a ball to roll through the caves, allowing your siblings to carry and throw you around. Become the ninja gremlin you always dreamed of with the Chameleon Skin, or unleash electric shockwaves with a well-timed fart. And many more!

Elektro Chomper Boss

Brace yourself for thrilling new boss encounters against the colossal Elektro Chomper. Beware of its powerful electric attacks—they are shockingly effective!

Rogue Drones

Ancient Colonist Technology remains active within the Ruins, and unfortunately, it has decided that you are a trespasser! Prepare for a constant barrage of hostile Rogue Drones.

Mini Hoppers

A new breed of miniature Mini Hoppers has been spotted in the Creators' Ruins Biome. While not dangerous individually, they appear in massive groups and will surely create pure chaos with their frenetic jumping behavior.

We can't wait for you to dive into the Creators' Ruins and experience all the new chaos! What part of this update are you most excited to try first?


About the Game

Take control of a cute naughty gremlin and do the bidding of your loving mechanical Mother!

Team up with friends to climb and jump through a physics-based world full of emergent surprises. Explore the ever-changing caves of a mysterious alien planet, complete objectives together, and use everything at your disposal to survive the run.

MAYHEM WITH FRIENDS

  • Experience unique moments with friends. Form a team of up to 4 players online or grab a friend for 2-player local split-screen.

  • Combine your group's abilities and overcome tricky obstacles: explore, evolve, adapt. There is never one single solution.

  • Hungry for more? Mother always has missions for you and your friends to complete - just make sure to come back in one piece!

EXPLORE ALIEN CAVES

  • Explore the endlessly replayable cave network of a mysterious alien planet, full of biodiversity and peculiar life-forms. Flora or Fauna, creatively utilize everything to your advantage, and when in doubt - EAT IT!

  • Sharpen your claws and climb everywhere - walls and ceilings included.

  • But even the most adept creatures will need some creative thinking to explore everything the caves have to offer - unleash your inner chaos gremlin!

CUSTOMIZE YOUR CHAOS

  • Complete missions and unlock new unique mutations. Extend your gameplay options and change up your playstyle for future runs.

  • Fart your way out of caves into safety, barf up projectiles to throw at foes (and friends) or use your rock skin fart to shield yourself and your friends from danger.

  • Unlock a range of patterns, colours, ears and more to customize your look. Create your unique little creature, ready to cause chaos and do Mother's bidding.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
